"[20] C92-028C ADVISORY TURN SIGN - YEL IN COLOR / POLE #P816322 - SDGE IS 97"
"[19] C92-028C ADV CORDS OF SHEARED OFF WOODEN POST - DMG TO POWER POLE "

"[9] [Notification] [CHP]-STAM HAD AN RP 97 W/ TC ADV @ 26564 N LAKE WOHLFORD AND THERE IS A 2YOA JUVENILE AND A MALE DRIVER UNDER THE INFLUENCE @ THE VEH [Shared]"
"[8] ALSO REPORTED POSS NEAR VALLEY CENTER RD [Shared]"
"[6] [Appended, 23:24:43] [3] IRR IN BACKGROUND SOMEONE NEAR RP ADV VEH POSS IS 20002 BUT MAKING SOUNDS LIKE ITS NOT GOING ANYWHERE"
"[3] FD BLK SD INTO A POLE "
"[4] [Appended, 23:24:43] [1] UNK VEH CRASHED INTO A POWERPOLE OR POWEBOX IN THE AREA AND ALL THE POWER IS NOW OUT"

Log.Location: "Sr52 E / I5 S Sr52 E Con"

details.IncidentDetail: "[34] C87-007C TAKING VEH OFF AT REGENTS TO DO 180 [Shared]"

"[14] VEH IS 1125 ON THE TRANS - NEG HAZ ON [Shared]"
"[1] PEOPLE OO VEHS / RP THINKS THERE IS A TC BC "WHY WOULD PEOPLE BE OO THEIR VEH'S ON A CON RAMP""
"[3] PIECES OF THE FENCE ALL OVER THE RD "
"[1] SV: UNK VEH POSSIBLY A BLK FORD MUSTANG OR CORVETTE"
"[14] C108-014C NEG TC / VEH OOG / 1124 // 1185 BLK MERZ SD"

"[9] HE CAN SHOW THE OFFICERS WHRE THE TC OCCRD "

"[5] THE RP DOES NOW KNOW THE NAME OF THE ST OR THE CROSS ST WHERE THE TC OCCRD--OTHER THAN IT WAS CLOSE TO 3-4 MILES FM WHERE HE IS "
